name: retinue
description: Codex plugin for running local coding agents as controllable subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Run OpenCode and Claude Code as Codex subagents.
interface.longDescription: Retinue exposes local MCP tools for spawning, waiting for, and closing controllable Codex subagents. The default 0.1.0 plugin route uses OpenCode on localhost with its plan agent; provider, model, login, and permission policy stay in the selected backend runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use Retinue to spawn an OpenCode plan subagent.
Wait for a Retinue subagent result.
